name: Save Dogogo
author: Poki
description: Save Dogogo is a fun drawing game where your mission is to protect the adorable Dogogo from a swarm of evil bees! Draw lines or shapes to shield Dogogo from the bee attacks. If your drawing can keep Dogogo safe for 10 seconds, you win! Use the platforms to your advantage and try to solve each puzzle with the least amount of drawing for a 3-star score. Can you save Dogogo in one go? How to play Save Dogogo? Click and hold to draw! Who created Save Dogogo? Save Dogogo is created by Kelly Ray J. Play their other games on Poki : Chicken Sword: Ninja Master , RoyaleBall.io , Space Ballz , Zen Splatter , Merge Party , and Hole N' Fun ! How can I play Save Dogogo for free? You can play Save Dogogo for free on Poki. Can I play Save Dogogo on mobile devices and desktop? Save Dogogo can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
